sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93124" key="salakwnei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σᾰλακ-ωνεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n93124.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pretentiousness</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg022:a37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">a37</biblScope> </bibl>; <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σᾰλακ-ωνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">snobbery</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:2:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
